title: the chairman
wikitext:
[]: the chairman             Quote Post by ericm » Thu Jun 02, 2011 7:00 pm Are there any theories on why the chairman turns out to be a 'cyborg'?

[]: Re: the chairman             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jun 02, 2011 7:21 pm ericm wrote: Are there any theories on why the chairman turns out to be a 'cyborg'?

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Thu Jun 02, 2011 11:32 pm I never once thought that Keel was a cyborg.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jun 03, 2011 12:13 am Cross of Iron wrote: I never once thought that Keel was a cyborg.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jun 03, 2011 1:07 am If you weren't drolling over young!Gendo, some may have noticed that he appeared to look mostly normal back on that "Second Impact coverup photo", except for his awful taste in Sunglasses. His mechanical add-ons must've come in the fifteen years afterwards.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Jun 03, 2011 2:20 am This is an interesting aspect of the Evangelion universe that isn't really explored. Are those type of "upgrades" common or specific to Keel? You'd think a world that has the technology of NERV would host some amazing medical advances.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Fri Jun 03, 2011 3:35 am On the other hand, world after second impact and every tiny bit of surplus funneled to NERV for Project EVA (and HIP) means very few people could probably afford anything like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jun 03, 2011 10:12 am You know what I just realized? In EoE, the "chairman" is revealed to be part chair. He is literally a chair-man .

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jun 03, 2011 5:13 pm Monk Ed wrote: You know what I just realized? In EoE, the "chairman" is revealed to be part chair. He is literally a chair-man .

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 03, 2011 5:19 pm That visor was a bit of a giveaway that not all was as it might seem . That he was more mechanical than that was pretty low-tier compared with all the other shit that was going down.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Jun 04, 2011 4:28 am So he is actually a 90 year old Cyclops from X-men? Now that is a plot twist.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Jun 04, 2011 11:33 am Knowing Anno, he probably wanted to make some statement about how humanity relies on technology to survive or something. Or maybe he thought it just looked cool, like those crosses he put everywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jun 04, 2011 11:54 am Trajan wrote: Knowing Anno, he probably wanted to make some statement about how humanity relies on technology to survive or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 04, 2011 2:39 pm I bet if Keel took off his visor he'd have laser eyebeams.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jun 04, 2011 4:13 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I bet if Keel took off his visor he'd have laser eyebeams.

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Sun Jun 05, 2011 1:20 am Reichu wrote: Not even when he left a ton of tubes and mechanical doodads on the floor after being melted down in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sun Jun 05, 2011 4:12 am ^He was probably thinking WTFISHAPPENINGOMGNOEZ at the time.
